name: Sim Leisure Group Ltd.
summary: Sim Leisure Group Ltd., an investment holding company, develops and operates theme parks in Penang, Malaysia. The company operates ESCAPE Adventureplay, a theme park; ESCAPE Waterplay, a water park; and ESCAPE Gravityplay, a theme park. Sim Leisure Group Ltd. was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Teluk Bahang, Malaysia.
